package rulecoverage

func PositiveAdler32ChecksumInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "adler32_checksum_in_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`adler32.Checksum(...)` inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
